tasks.action: communicate with other teachers using a chat function
tasks.condition: so that i can learn from other teachers and share experiences

tasks.action: do a quiz about a certain topic that is connected to a level or part of a level
tasks.condition: so that i get a sense of reward for completing something

tasks.action: have flashcards available in a digital format, organized by topic and source
tasks.condition: so that i can select the appropriate materials for my learning needs

tasks.action: receive email notifications about my progress and new learning opportunities
tasks.condition: so that i am always updated

tasks.action: add videos related to a certain module in the system
tasks.condition: so that i am always updated

tasks.action: add flashcards related to a certain module in the system
tasks.condition: so that i am always updated

conditions: so that i can learn from other teachers and share experiences
so that i am better prepared for teaching
so that i can be placed at the right level without wasting time or feeling frustrated by levels that are too easy or difficult
so that i can track my learning progress
so that i know what i have learned
so that i get a sense of reward for completing something
so that i can select the appropriate materials for my learning needs
so that i can resolve technical issues or system questions i might have
so that i can regain access to the system in case i forget my password
so that my details stay current and accurate
so that i am always updated
